html:
“This armor blocks damage, but has a nasty habit of driving its wearer insane.”

-

The Night Armor is a wearable Magical Armor, often paired up with a Dark Sword. It requires 5 Nightmare Fuel and 3 Papyrus to craft and a Shadow Manipulator to prototype. It is one of Maxwell's starting items in the single player game.

It has 750 durability and absorbs 95% of physical damage. The Night Armor drains Sanity by 10/min while worn and decreases Sanity by 10% of total damage taken (not only absorbed by the armor).

Example: If a player wearing Night Armor is hit by a Spider Queen (80 ), then

  • 80 × 0.95 = 76 damage is taken by Night Armor.
  • 80 − 76 = 4 damage is taken by the player's .
  • The player's will be decreased by 80 × 0.1 = 8.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Corrupted Cloak skin was introduced during the official Year of the Carrat event in 2020.
Woven - Elegant
Year of the Carrat Collection
Corrupted Cloak
Black suits you.
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Dark Wizard Collection
Cursed Cloak
This cloak clings to you like your own shadow.
Woven - Elegant
Shadowy Armor
The darkness will protect you.

Tips

  • It is useful to also equip a head-slot item which can boost sanity, such as the Tam o' Shanter, helping to offset the sanity drain while still having very high physical protection.
  • The Night Armor is especially useful on Wanda in her old form, nullifying the sanity drain, and allowing her to benefit from the bonus damage on shadow weapons, while staying more safe.
  • In Don't Starve Together, as of the Encore update, the Night Armor (along with the Dark Sword) do not apply a sanity drain on Maxwell. Considering his frailty and the ease of which he is able to farm Nightmare Fuel, the Night Armor is a good option for protecting him.

Trivia

  • The Night Armor was added in the Insanity! update.
  • When paired with the Shelmet or the Thulecite Crown, the player is able to absorb 99.5% of incoming damage (doesn't apply to ), enough to survive a Gunpowder explosion, losing 1 and 20 .
  • Wickerbottom states the armor transfers the damage into another dimension.
  • The Night Armor makes a "warping" noise when the player moves while wearing it.

Assets

Night ArmorCorrupted CloakCursed CloakShadowy Armor

"armor_sanity"
“Wearing this makes me feel safe and insecure.”
–Wilson
“Like being wrapped in smoke.”
–Willow
“Is like wearing scary little rag!”
–Wolfgang
“A perfectly safe way to go insane.”
–Wendy
“I WILL PROTECT MYSELF WITH NOTHINGNESS”
–WX-78
“A protective shroud that transfers attacks to another dimension.”
–Wickerbottom
“It makes me queasy to look at.”
–Woodie
“Time to wrap myself in nightmares.”
–Maxwell
“Armor made from the dark fuel! I cannot wait to see its effects.”
–Wagstaff
“Ströng, but I find my mind wanders...”
–Wigfrid
“I'm a bit uneasy wearing this, but it's effective.”
–Webber
“Eyuk! It makes my skin crawl.”
–Walani
“Am I crazy to wear this?”
–Warly
“Feels good ta put it on.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS ARMOR MADE OF NIGHTMARE BITS”
–Wilba
“Brain Guard”
–Wormwood
“Looks... safe?”
–Wheeler
“Soothingly unsettling.”
–Winona
“Keeps the flesh body safe! The mind's another story.”
–Wortox
“Don't like it, flurp!!”
–Wurt
“Wait... is this dangerous?”
–Walter
“Shadow magic is just a tool after all, I can use it to my advantage.”
–Wanda
“This armor blocks damage, but has a nasty habit of driving its wearer insane.”

The Night Armor is a wearable Magical Armor, often paired up with a Dark Sword. It requires 5 Nightmare Fuel and 3 Papyrus to craft and a Shadow Manipulator to prototype. It is one of Maxwell's starting items in the single player game.
It has 750 durability and absorbs 95% of physical damage. The Night Armor drains Sanity by 10/min while worn and decreases Sanity by 10% of total damage taken (not only absorbed by the armor).
Example: If a player wearing Night Armor is hit by a Spider Queen (80 ), then
80 × 0.95 = 76 damage is taken by Night Armor.
80 − 76 = 4 damage is taken by the player's .
The player's will be decreased by 80 × 0.1 = 8.

It is useful to also equip a head-slot item which can boost sanity, such as the Tam o' Shanter, helping to offset the sanity drain while still having very high physical protection.
The Night Armor is especially useful on Wanda in her old form, nullifying the sanity drain, and allowing her to benefit from the bonus damage on shadow weapons, while staying more safe.
In Don't Starve Together, as of the Encore update, the Night Armor (along with the Dark Sword) do not apply a sanity drain on Maxwell. Considering his frailty and the ease of which he is able to farm Nightmare Fuel, the Night Armor is a good option for protecting him.

The Night Armor was added in the Insanity! update.
When paired with the Shelmet or the Thulecite Crown, the player is able to absorb 99.5% of incoming damage (doesn't apply to ), enough to survive a Gunpowder explosion, losing 1 and 20 .
Wickerbottom states the armor transfers the damage into another dimension.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Áo giáp đêm là Áo giáp ma thuật có thể đeo được, thường được kết hợp với Thanh kiếm bóng tối. Nó cần 5 Nhiên Liệu Ác Mộng và 3 Giấy Cói để chế tạo và một Máy Điều Khiển Bóng Tối để tạo nguyên mẫu. Nó là một trong những vật phẩm khởi đầu của Maxwell trong phần chơi đơn.
